calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Vacated

Defendant Mary Nichols' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery Propounded To Plntf And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Sanctions Against Plntf And Plntf'S Counsel, Joseph Tobener
Off Calendar Nov-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rahman Popal, Esq. 415-504-2165 of Tobener Ravenscroft for Plaintiff/Opposing party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Mary Nichols' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery Propounded To Plaintiff And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Sanctions Against Plaintiff's Counsel, Joseph Tobener.

Motion is granted in part and denied in part. Plaintiff has stated that he is willing to stipulate to dismiss his IIED claim and seek only garden variety emotional distress. The Court orders that the Plaintiff dismiss its IIED claim with prejudice within 15 days of the date of this order, or, in the alternative, provide verified responses to Form Interrogatory No. 10.2. The parties' requests for sanctions are denied.

Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth Riles, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
